   95| if (fs.existsSync(nodeModulesPath)) {
   96|   try {
   97|     // Use du to get sizes of top-level node_modules directories
   98|     const duOutput = execSync(
   99|       `du -sh node_modules/* 2>/dev/null | sort -hr | head -50`,
  100|       {
  101|         cwd: path.join(__dirname, "../../"),
  102|         encoding: "utf8",
  103|         stdio: ["pipe", "pipe", "ignore"], // Suppress stderr
  104|       }
  105|     )
  106| 
  107|     console.log("Top 50 Largest Dependencies by Install Size:\n")
  108|     console.log(duOutput)
  109|   } catch (error) {
  110|     console.log("Could not analyze node_modules sizes\n")
  111|   }
  112| } else {
  113|   console.log("node_modules not found. Run `yarn install` first.\n")
  114| }
  115| 
  116| // Save detailed report
  117| const report = {
  118|   totalPackages: packagePaths.length,
  119|   totalUniqueDependencies: allDependencies.size,
  120|   packagesWithMostDeps: packageDependencies.slice(0, 20),
  121|   mostCommonDeps: sortedDeps.map(([dep, info]) => ({
  122|     name: dep,
  123|     usedInPackages: info.count,
  124|     versions: Array.from(info.versions),
  125|     hasConflict: info.versions.size > 1,
  126|   })),
  127|   versionConflicts: conflicts.map(([dep, info]) => ({
  128|     name: dep,
  129|     versions: Array.from(info.versions),
  130|     packages: info.packages,
  131|   })),
  132| }
  133| 
  134| const reportPath = path.join(__dirname, "../../", "dependency-analysis.json")
  135| fs.writeFileSync(reportPath, JSON.stringify(report, null, 2))
  136| console.log(`\nDetailed report saved to: dependency-analysis.json`)
